signals.headline: SEC and CFTC Formally Classify XRP as Digital Commodity** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
SEC and CFTC Formally Classify XRP as Digital Commodity** | YES | HIGH confidence

On March 17, 2026, the SEC and CFTC formally classified XRP as a **digital commodity rather than a security**, resolving years of legal ambiguity.[5] This classification triggered the launch of seven spot XRP ETFs in the United States, with total assets under management exceeding $1 billion.[5]

signals.headline: XRP's Daily MACD Flips Bullish After January 2026** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
XRP's Daily MACD Flips Bullish After January 2026** | YES | HIGH confidence

The **daily MACD indicator flipped bullish in mid-April 2026**—the first clean crossover since early January 2026.[1][5] This technical signal is historically significant: the previous MACD bullish flip in January triggered a violent 25% rally to $2.40 within seven trading days.[5]

signals.headline: Strongest Weekly ETF Inflows of 2026** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Strongest Weekly ETF Inflows of 2026** | YES | HIGH confidence

XRP ETFs absorbed **$55 million in the week ending April 18**—the strongest weekly inflow of 2026.[5] Critically, this money is flowing in consistently day-after-day rather than in sporadic bursts, suggesting sustained institutional demand.[5]

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Advancing in Senate Banking Committee** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Advancing in Senate Banking Committee** | YES | HIGH confidence

The **CLARITY Act, which would solidify XRP's commodity status in federal law**, is advancing in the Senate Banking Committee and is expected to receive markup by early May 2026.[5] This legislation aims to establish which agency—the SEC or CFTC—will oversee digital assets going forward.[4]

signals.headline: Ripple Announces Quantum-Resistant Security Roadmap** | YES | MEDIUM confidence
signals.raw:
Ripple Announces Quantum-Resistant Security Roadmap** | YES | MEDIUM confidence

Ripple unveiled a **four-phase quantum-resistance roadmap on April 20, 2026**, targeting XRP Ledger quantum-readiness by 2028.[4] Phase 3 (H2 2026) involves deploying hybrid signature schemes on test networks.[4][6]
